---
name: Public alpha feedback
about: Share installation, onboarding, and trust-score interpretation feedback
title: "[alpha-feedback] "
labels: feedback
assignees: ""
---

## Workflow

What were you trying to do?

## Install friction

Where did setup or environment configuration slow you down?

## Config friction

What part of the tabular mapping or command flow was unclear?

## Trust-score interpretation

Which reason codes or score changes felt surprising?

## Compare, batch, and export

Did `compare`, `batch`, or `export` help you make a workflow decision? If not, what was missing?

## Artifacts

If you can share them safely, include:

- CLI output
- `batch_summary.json` / `compare.json` / `export_summary.json`
- redacted report links or screenshots
- notes about whether the artifact was clear to a teammate who did not run the command
